jobs.teamsize_max: Your team has too many members to start this job. [%d]

bag_snatch.label: Smash and Grab
bag_snatch.information: Quick grab jobs in parking lots. Fast in, fast out.

steps.1: Head to the marked parking lot on your GPS. Look for the area with several parked cars — this is your target zone.
steps.2: Approach a vehicle and break the window by use target button next to the window. Repeat this process for all marked vehicles.
steps.3: Open your inventory, find the stolen bags and open them to reveal the contents. Then follow the GPS to the buyer and use target to hand over the items.

bag_snatch.leader_can_deliver: Team leader can deliver the collected items

car_theft.label: Car Theft
car_theft.information: Steal a high-end car for a client who doesnot ask questions.

steps.1: Follow the GPS marker on your map and head to the designated area. Stay alert — the place may be guarded.
steps.2: Engage with any hostile enemies in the area. Use cover, eliminate all threats, and make sure the location is safe before proceeding.
steps.3: Once the area is clear, locate the target vehicle and use target to open door. Make sure no enemies are left nearby that can stop you.
steps.4: Drive the stolen vehicle to the drop-off point shown on your GPS. Avoid police attention and safely deliver it to complete the job.

chop_shop.label: Chop Shop Operation
chop_shop.information: Strip down stolen vehicles and sell the parts on the black market.

steps.1: Go to the marked area on your GPS to locate the target vehicle.
steps.2: Use your Digiscanner to scan the surrounding area and find the car key signal. Once found, copy the key and unlock the vehicle.
steps.3: Drive the stolen vehicle carefully to the Chop Shop location marked on your map. Avoid attracting unwanted attention.
steps.4: Park the vehicle in the designated spot at the Chop Shop. Press [E] to dismantle it, then deliver the parts to the assigned contact or drop-off point.

cocaine_job.label: Cocaine Smuggling
cocaine_job.description: Produce cocaine packets in the laboratory
cocaine_job.information: Handle the cocaine operation from gather to package.

steps.1: Head to any laboratory marked on your map. These labs are scattered around the city and named Cocaine Lab.
steps.2: Once inside the lab, approach the workstation and press [E] to start producing cocaine. After production, use the packaging station to pack the product before leaving.

corner_deal.label: Corner Dealing
corner_deal.information: Hold a corner and deal drugs to passing customers.

steps.1: Open the menu with /drugsell and select a target area from the list to begin corner dealing.
steps.2: Head to the selected area shown on your GPS. Make sure it's a populated location with foot traffic.
steps.3: Stay in the area and wait for NPC customers to approach you. Interact with them to offer drugs and complete sales.

commands.desc_set_corner_area: illegalpack, corner deal, set corner area.

inputs.heading: Change Some Options
inputs.select_corner_area_description: Select the area to corner hold

corner_deal.cant_corner_while_dead: You can not corner holding while dead!
corner_deal.cant_corner_here: You can not corner holding here!
corner_deal.on_started: You hold a corner, wait for customers
corner_deal.customer_given_up: Customer has given up, waiting for another customer

counterfeit_money.label: Counterfeit Money Operation
counterfeit_money.description: Produce counterfeit money step by step.
counterfeit_money.information: Go through the full process of printing and preparing counterfeit money.

steps.1: Travel to any counterfeit facility marked on your map to begin the operation. Blip names are Counterfeit Facility.
steps.2: Use the equipment inside the lab to print counterfeit bills, then process and package them into dirty money ready for sale.

steps.1: Approach the designated NPC marked on your map and use target button to start the diving mission.
steps.2: Use the boat spawn point to get a boat and head out to the dive location shown on your GPS.
steps.3: Equip your diving suit, dive underwater, and search the wrecks for loot. Collect loot using the target.
steps.4: After collecting the loot, return to the NPC onshore and use target to complete the mission and hand over the items.

fraud.label: Fraud Scheme
fraud.description: Fake IDs and stolen credit cards.

steps.1: Go to the marked ATM on your map and use target to insert the hacking device.
steps.2: Leave the immediate area and connect remotely to the device to avoid detection.
steps.3: Use your hacking tool to intercept customer data as they use the ATM. Wait patiently for customers to approach.
steps.4: Travel to the secret office marked on your GPS, then use the equipment to duplicate the stolen data.
steps.5: Use the duplicated data to withdraw money from the bank discreetly.

fraud.capture_failed: Information not recovered, waiting for other customer
fraud.capture_success: Successful, wait for the other customer
fraud.too_far_from_atm: You are too far from the ATM

gun_smuggling.label: Gun Smuggling
gun_smuggling.description: Move illegal firearms to the buyer.

steps.1: Go to the marked location and use target to talk to the contact NPC.
steps.2: Head to the container area where the truck is parked.
steps.3: Use force to open the container lids by pressing target button near them.
steps.4: Operate the forklift to pick up the weapon crates and load them onto the truck.
steps.5: Drive the loaded truck carefully to the delivery location marked on your GPS.
steps.6: After delivery, return the forklift to the vehicle or designated spot.

gun_smuggling.attached_forklift: Crate picked up with forklift, take to truck

illegal_delivery.label: Illegal Delivery

steps.2: Collect the boxes and load them into the vehicle by pressing [E] near the boxes.
steps.3: Drive carefully to each drop-off point marked on your GPS and unload the boxes by pressing [E].
steps.4: After all deliveries are complete, return to the vehicle and park it at the designated spot.

illegal_delivery.donot_have_box: You do not have the box

meth_job.label: Meth Lab Run
meth_job.information: Handle the meth operation from cooking to package.

steps.1: Travel to any Meth Lab marked on your map to start the operation.
steps.2: Use the cooking station inside the lab to produce meth, then move to the packaging station to pack the meth.

money_laundering.label: Money Laundering
money_laundering.description: Clean dirty money through a fake business.
money_laundering.information: Use your front business to turn illegal cash into clean profit.

steps.1: Go to the marked money laundering location on your map and press [E] to start cleaning your dirty money through the fake business.

money_laundering.daily_limit_reached: You have reached your daily limit for money laundering.

moonshine.label: Moonshine
moonshine.description: Produce illegal alcohol and sell it on the black market.
moonshine.information: Set up a distillation system in an abandoned cabin deep in the woods. Gather the necessary ingredients, produce the moonshine, bottle it, and distribute it discreetly. Avoid attracting attention from the police or rival gangs.

steps.1: Go to the marked location and use target to talk to the contact NPC.
steps.2: Purchase the 'Moonshine Still' from the illegal market using the menu.
steps.3: Drive your vehicle to the designated distillation area marked on your map.
steps.4: Place the moonshine stills in the marked spots.
steps.5: Mash the fruit, mix the ingredients, and cook the moonshine using the stoves. Once cooked, package the product on the table, place it in your vehicle, and deliver it to the buyer discreetly.

moonshine.can_not_place_here: You cannot place it here, it is too far
moonshine.not_cooked_yet: It is not cooked yet, you have to wait %d second
moonshine.moonshine_packed: Moonshine packed, placed in the vehicle
moonshine.you_donot_have_moonshine: You donot have enough moonshine. You need %d!

weed_job.label: Weed Distribution
weed_job.description: Handle the weed operation from gather to package.
weed_job.information: Handle the weed operation from gather to package.

steps.1: Go to any Weed Lab marked on your map to start gathering weed.
steps.2: Collect wild herbs, then go to the packaging station to package the wild herbs for distribution, and then roll them.

container_heli.label: Container Transport
container_heli.information: Use Skylift helicopters to pick up and transport containers to a designated drop-off zone.

steps.1: Go to the marked area and approach the helipad. The Skylift helicopters will spawn when you get close.
steps.2: Use the Skylift helicopters to pick up all 6 containers and transport them to the delivery zone marked on your GPS.
steps.3: After all containers are delivered, return the helicopters to the helipad to complete the mission.

container_heli.all_containers_delivered: All containers delivered! Return the helicopters to the helipad.
container_heli.not_in_skylift: You must be in a Skylift helicopter!
container_heli.heli_already_has_container: This helicopter already has a container attached!
container_heli.no_container_attached: No container is attached to this helicopter!
container_heli.in_delivery_zone: You are in the delivery zone. Press G to drop the container.

plane_drug_delivery.label: Plane Drug Delivery
plane_drug_delivery.description: Deliver drug packages by plane to various drop points.
plane_drug_delivery.information: Load drug packages onto the plane and deliver them to multiple air drop points across the map. Be careful not to attract unwanted attention!

steps.1: Get to the airfield and take a plane
steps.2: Load drug packages onto the plane
steps.4: Return the plane to the airfield

chicken_kidnapping.label: Animal Smuggling
chicken_kidnapping.description: Steal chicken cages from a guarded farm.
chicken_kidnapping.information: Infiltrate a guarded chicken farm, eliminate the guards, and steal 10 cages. Load them into your van and deliver them to the drop-off point.

steps.1: Go to the vehicle spawn location and get the delivery van
steps.2: Drive to the farm and eliminate all the guards
steps.3: Collect 10 cages and load them into the van
steps.4: Return the van with the cages to the delivery point

chicken_kidnapping.too_far: You are too far from the cage
chicken_kidnapping.cage_taken: Cage taken! Take it to the van.
chicken_kidnapping.enemies_cleared: Guards eliminated! Now collect the cages.

steps.1: Go to the marked location and press [E] to talk to the Boxing Coach.
steps.2: Accept fights, compete in boxing matches, and earn money based on your performance.

npc_boxing.match_is_about_start: The match is about to start in %d seconds.
npc_boxing.left_ring: You lost the match because you left the ring.

fraud.tutorial_description: Welcome to the fraud tutorial. This guide will walk you through how to use the laptop application to clone fake ID cards and generate illegal income.
fraud.step1_description: Open the 'fraud.exe' application on the laptop. No additional setup is required; it will directly start the card cloning process.
fraud.card_cloner_description: Ensure the MSR device is connected. Insert a blank card, then click 'Clone'. Your fake ID card will be ready to use or sell.

card_cloner.title: Card Cloner
card_cloner.empty: Empty, no card detected. Place it !
